frac_form = QFormLayout() frac_form.setSpacing(4) self._val_frac_spin = QDoubleSpinBox() self._val_frac_spin.setRange(0.0, 0.4) self._val_frac_spin.setSingleStep(0.05) self._val_frac_spin.setValue(0.1) self._val_frac_spin.setSuffix(" (val)") self._val_frac_spin.setToolTip("Fraction held out as validation set") frac_form.addRow("Val frac:", self._val_frac_spin) self._test_frac_spin = QDoubleSpinBox() self._test_frac_spin.setRange(0.05, 0.5) self._test_frac_spin.setSingleStep(0.05) self._test_frac_spin.setValue(0.2) self._test_frac_spin.setSuffix(" (test)") frac_form.addRow("Test frac:", self._test_frac_spin) split_lay.addLayout(frac_form)
self._radio_cross.toggled.connect(self._update_split_ui) self._radio_combined.toggled.connect(self._update_split_ui) self._radio_cross.toggled.connect(self._update_preview) self._radio_combined.toggled.connect(self._update_preview) left_lay.addWidget(split_grp)
# Cross-validation cv_grp = QGroupBox("Cross-Validation") cv_grp.setStyleSheet(_PANEL_STYLE) cv_lay = QVBoxLayout(cv_grp) self._cv_btn_group = QButtonGroup(self)
self._cv_none = QRadioButton("None (single split)") self._cv_none.setChecked(True) self._cv_btn_group.addButton(self._cv_none) cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_none)
self._cv_kfold = QRadioButton("K-Fold stratified") self._cv_btn_group.addButton(self._cv_kfold) kf_row = QHBoxLayout() kf_row.addWidget(self._cv_kfold) self._cv_k_spin = QSpinBox() self._cv_k_spin.setRange(2, 10) self._cv_k_spin.setValue(5) self._cv_k_spin.setMaximumWidth(55) kf_row.addWidget(QLabel("K:")) kf_row.addWidget(self._cv_k_spin) kf_row.addStretch() cv_lay.addLayout(kf_row)
self._cv_loso = QRadioButton("Leave-One-Subject-Out") self._cv_btn_group.addButton(self._cv_loso) cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_loso) left_lay.addWidget(cv_grp)
# Preprocessing pre_grp = QGroupBox("Preprocessing") pre_lay = QVBoxLayout(pre_grp) pre_form = QFormLayout() pre_form.setSpacing(5)
self._norm_combo = QComboBox() self._norm_combo.addItem("Z-score per channel", "z_channel") self._norm_combo.addItem("Z-score global", "z_global") self._norm_combo.addItem("None", "none") pre_form.addRow("Normalise:", self._norm_combo)
self._ch_reduce_combo = QComboBox() self._ch_reduce_combo.addItem("None", "none") self._ch_reduce_combo.addItem("Top-N by variance", "variance_top_n") self._ch_reduce_combo.addItem("PCA (flatten)", "pca") self._ch_reduce_combo.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._update_ch_reduce_ui) pre_form.addRow("Channel reduce:", self._ch_reduce_combo)
self._ch_n_spin = QSpinBox() self._ch_n_spin.setRange(1, 512) self._ch_n_spin.setValue(32) self._ch_n_spin.setEnabled(False) pre_form.addRow("# channels:", self._ch_n_spin)
self._augment_cb = QCheckBox("Augment training data") pre_form.addRow(self._augment_cb)
self._noise_spin = QDoubleSpinBox() self._noise_spin.setRange(0.0, 0.5) self._noise_spin.setSingleStep(0.005) self._noise_spin.setValue(0.005) self._noise_spin.setEnabled(False) self._augment_cb.toggled.connect( lambda c: (self._noise_spin.setEnabled(c), self._shift_spin.setEnabled(c))) pre_form.addRow("Noise σ:", self._noise_spin)
self._shift_spin = QSpinBox() self._shift_spin.setRange(0, 50) self._shift_spin.setValue(5) self._shift_spin.setSuffix(" samples") self._shift_spin.setEnabled(False) pre_form.addRow("Time shift ±:", self._shift_spin) left_lay.addWidget(pre_grp)
# Model model_grp = QGroupBox("Model") model_lay = QFormLayout(model_grp) model_lay.setSpacing(5)
self._model_combo = QComboBox() for display, _ in _MODEL_TYPES: self._model_combo.addItem(display) model_lay.addRow("Model type:", self._model_combo)
self._feat_combo = QComboBox() self._feat_combo.addItem("Default features (MAV, RMS, WL, ZC, SSC, …)") self._feat_combo.addItem("Raw EMG windows") model_lay.addRow("Features:", self._feat_combo)
self._model_name_edit = QLineEdit() self._model_name_edit.setPlaceholderText("auto-generated if empty") model_lay.addRow("Model name:", self._model_name_edit) left_lay.addWidget(model_grp)
# Preview + train self._preview_lbl = QLabel("—") self._preview_lbl.setStyleSheet( f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;" f"background:{_C['panel']};border:1px solid {_C['border']};" "border-radius:4px;padding:5px;") self._preview_lbl.setWordWrap(True) left_lay.addWidget(self._preview_lbl)
btn_row = QHBoxLayout() self._train_btn = QPushButton("Train Model") self._train_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_PRIMARY) self._train_btn.setFixedHeight(34) self._train_btn.setEnabled(False) self._train_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_train) btn_row.addWidget(self._train_btn)
self._stop_btn = QPushButton("■ Stop") self._stop_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) self._stop_btn.setFixedHeight(38) self._stop_btn.setEnabled(False) self._stop_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_stop_training) btn_row.addWidget(self._stop_btn)
close_btn = QPushButton("Close") close_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) close_btn.setFixedHeight(38) close_btn.clicked.connect(self.reject) btn_row.addWidget(close_btn) left_lay.addLayout(btn_row)
self._progress = QProgressBar() self._progress.setRange(0, 100) self._progress.setValue(0) left_lay.addWidget(self._progress)
self._status_lbl = QLabel("") self._status_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") self._status_lbl.setWordWrap(True) left_lay.addWidget(self._status_lbl)
left_lay.addStretch()
# ── Right panel: results tabs ───────────────────────────────────────── right_widget = QWidget() right_lay = QVBoxLayout(right_widget) right_lay.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0) root.addWidget(right_widget, stretch=1)
self._results_tabs = QTabWidget() right_lay.addWidget(self._results_tabs)
# Tab 0: Summary summary_tab = QWidget() sum_lay = QVBoxLayout(summary_tab)
# Score banner self._banner = QLabel("Train a model to see results") self._banner.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter) self._banner.setStyleSheet( f"font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:{_C['accent2']};" f"background:{_C['panel']};border-radius:8px;padding:14px;") sum_lay.addWidget(self._banner)
# Metrics row metrics_row = QHBoxLayout() self._metric_cards: Dict[str, QLabel] = {} for key, label, color in [ ("train_acc", "Train Acc", _C["success"]), ("val_acc", "Val Acc", _C["warning"]), ("test_acc", "Test Acc", _C["accent2"]), ("cv_mean", "CV Mean", _C["accent"]), ]: card = QFrame() card.setStyleSheet( f"background:{_C['panel']};border:1px solid {_C['border']};" "border-radius:8px;padding:6px;") card_lay = QVBoxLayout(card) title_lbl = QLabel(label) title_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;font-weight:600;") title_lbl.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter) card_lay.addWidget(title_lbl) val_lbl = QLabel("—") val_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{color};font-size:20px;font-weight:700;") val_lbl.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter) card_lay.addWidget(val_lbl) metrics_row.addWidget(card) self._metric_cards[key] = val_lbl sum_lay.addLayout(metrics_row)
# Per-class table self._summary_lbl = QLabel("") self._summary_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"font-size:11px;color:{_C['muted']};padding:2px 4px;") sum_lay.addWidget(self._summary_lbl)
self._results_table = QTableWidget() self._results_table.setColumnCount(5) self._results_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels( ["Gesture", "Accuracy", "95% CI", "Windows", "Bar"]) self._results_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._results_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) self._results_table.setAlternatingRowColors(True) self._results_table.setSelectionBehavior(QAbstractItemView.SelectionBehavior.SelectRows) sum_lay.addWidget(self._results_table)
# Per-subject table self._subj_result_lbl = QLabel("Per-subject accuracy:") self._subj_result_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") sum_lay.addWidget(self._subj_result_lbl) self._subj_table = QTableWidget() self._subj_table.setColumnCount(2) self._subj_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(["Subject", "Test Accuracy"]) self._subj_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._subj_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) self._subj_table.setMaximumHeight(120) sum_lay.addWidget(self._subj_table)
save_export_row = QHBoxLayout() self._save_btn = QPushButton("Save Model") self._save_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_PRIMARY) self._save_btn.setFixedHeight(34) self._save_btn.setEnabled(False) self._save_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_save_model) save_export_row.addWidget(self._save_btn)
self._export_btn = QPushButton(" Export CSV") self._export_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) self._export_btn.setFixedHeight(32) self._export_btn.setEnabled(False) self._export_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_export_csv) save_export_row.addWidget(self._export_btn) sum_lay.addLayout(save_export_row)
self._results_tabs.addTab(summary_tab, "Summary")
# Tab 1: Confusion matrix cm_tab = QWidget() cm_lay = QVBoxLayout(cm_tab) self._cm_canvas = _ConfusionMatrixCanvas() cm_lay.addWidget(self._cm_canvas) self._results_tabs.addTab(cm_tab, "Confusion Matrix")
# Tab 2: Live training curves live_tab = QWidget() live_lay = QVBoxLayout(live_tab) live_info = QLabel("Live loss and accuracy curves update during training (deep models only).") live_info.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") live_lay.addWidget(live_info) self._live_canvas = _LiveCurveCanvas() live_lay.addWidget(self._live_canvas) self._results_tabs.addTab(live_tab, "Training Curves")
# Tab 3: Learning curve lc_tab = QWidget() lc_lay = QVBoxLayout(lc_tab) lc_hdr = QHBoxLayout() lc_hdr.addWidget(QLabel("Compute learning curve (accuracy vs. #training files):")) self._lc_btn = QPushButton("Run") self._lc_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) self._lc_btn.setFixedHeight(34) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(False) self._lc_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_learning_curve) lc_hdr.addWidget(self._lc_btn) lc_hdr.addStretch() lc_lay.addLayout(lc_hdr) self._lc_canvas = _LearningCurveCanvas() lc_lay.addWidget(self._lc_canvas) self._results_tabs.addTab(lc_tab, "Learning Curve")
# Tab 4: CV results cv_tab = QWidget() cv_lay = QVBoxLayout(cv_tab) self._cv_table = QTableWidget() self._cv_table.setColumnCount(2) self._cv_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(["Fold / Subject", "Accuracy"]) self._cv_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._cv_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_table) self._cv_summary_lbl = QLabel("") self._cv_summary_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['accent2']};font-weight:600;") cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_summary_lbl) self._results_tabs.addTab(cv_tab, "CV Folds")
# Tab 5: Model comparison cmp_tab = QWidget() cmp_lay = QVBoxLayout(cmp_tab) cmp_hdr = QHBoxLayout() cmp_hdr.addWidget(QLabel("All trained models this session (sorted by test accuracy):")) clear_cmp_btn = QPushButton("Clear") clear_cmp_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) clear_cmp_btn.setFixedHeight(24) clear_cmp_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_clear_comparison) cmp_hdr.addWidget(clear_cmp_btn) cmp_hdr.addStretch() cmp_lay.addLayout(cmp_hdr) self._cmp_table = QTableWidget() self._cmp_table.setColumnCount(7) self._cmp_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels( ["Name", "Type", "Train Acc", "Val Acc", "Test Acc", "CV Mean", "Time"]) self._cmp_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._cmp_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) self._cmp_table.setAlternatingRowColors(True) cmp_lay.addWidget(self._cmp_table) save_best_btn = QPushButton("Save Selected Model") save_best_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_PRIMARY) save_best_btn.setFixedHeight(30) save_best_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_save_selected_from_comparison) cmp_lay.addWidget(save_best_btn) self._results_tabs.addTab(cmp_tab, "Compare Models")
# Tab 6: Log log_tab = QWidget() log_lay = QVBoxLayout(log_tab) self._log_text = QTextEdit() self._log_text.setReadOnly(True) self._log_text.setStyleSheet( f"QTextEdit{{font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;" f"background:{_C['bg']};color:{_C['text']};" f"border:1px solid {_C['border']};border-radius:3px;padding:4px;}}") log_lay.addWidget(self._log_text) self._results_tabs.addTab(log_tab, "Log")
# Initialise split UI self._update_split_ui()
# ─── auto-detect & helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _try_auto_detect(self): try: from playagain_pipeline.gui.widgets.quattrocento_loader import discover_quattrocento_root p = discover_quattrocento_root(self._data_dir) if p: self._set_root(p) except Exception: pass
def _update_split_ui(self): cross = self._radio_cross.isChecked() self._train_tags_edit.setEnabled(cross) self._val_tags_edit.setEnabled(cross) self._test_tags_edit.setEnabled(cross) self._val_frac_spin.setEnabled(not cross) self._test_frac_spin.setEnabled(not cross)
def _update_ch_reduce_ui(self): enabled = self._ch_reduce_combo.currentData() != "none" self._ch_n_spin.setEnabled(enabled)
def _primary_config(self) -> Tuple[int, int]: return self._ws_spin.value(), self._nc_spin.value()
def _primary_recs(self): if self._loader is None: return [] ws, nc = self._primary_config() return [r for r in self._loader.recordings if r.window_size == ws and r.n_channels == nc]
def _selected_gestures(self) -> List[str]: return [item.data(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole) for item in self._gest_list.selectedItems()]
def _selected_subjects(self) -> List[str]: sel = [item.data(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole) for item in self._subj_list.selectedItems()] return sel if sel else None # None = all subjects
# ─── slots ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@Slot() def _on_browse(self): p = QFileDialog.getExistingDirectory( self, "Select Quattrocento Data Root", str(self._data_dir)) if p: self._set_root(Path(p))
def _set_root(self, path: Path): self._root_edit.setText(str(path)) self._scan_btn.setEnabled(True) self._scan_info.setText(f"Click 'Scan' to discover recordings in:\n{path}")
@Slot() def _on_scan(self): from playagain_pipeline.gui.widgets.quattrocento_loader import QuattrocentoSubjectLoader root = Path(self._root_edit.text()) ws, nc = self._primary_config() self._scan_btn.setEnabled(False) self._scan_info.setText("Scanning…") try: loader = QuattrocentoSubjectLoader(root) all_recs = loader.scan(verbose=False) primary = [r for r in all_recs if r.window_size == ws and r.n_channels == nc] skipped = len(all_recs) - len(primary) self._loader = loader
gestures = sorted( {r.gesture for r in primary}, key=lambda g: _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER.index(g) if g in _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER else 999) self._gest_list.clear() for g in gestures: n = sum(1 for r in primary if r.gesture == g) item = QListWidgetItem(f"{g} ({n} files)") item.setData(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole, g) self._gest_list.addItem(item) self._gest_list.selectAll()
subjects = sorted({r.subject_id for r in primary}) self._subj_list.clear() for s in subjects: item = QListWidgetItem(s) item.setData(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole, s) self._subj_list.addItem(item) self._subj_list.selectAll()
trial_labels = sorted({r.trial_label for r in primary}) info = ( f"Found {len(primary)} primary files ({ws}ws × {nc}ch)\n" f"Subjects : {', '.join(subjects)}\n" f"Trial labels : {', '.join(trial_labels)}\n" ) if skipped: info += f"(skipped {skipped} files with different config)" self._scan_info.setText(info) self._train_btn.setEnabled(True) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(True) self._update_preview() self._log(f"Scan complete: {len(primary)} files, " f"{len(gestures)} gestures, labels: {trial_labels}") except Exception as e: self._scan_info.setText(f"Scan error: {e}") self._log(f"Scan error: {e}") finally: self._scan_btn.setEnabled(True)
def _update_preview(self): if self._loader is None: return gestures = self._selected_gestures() subjects = self._selected_subjects() recs = [r for r in self._primary_recs() if r.gesture in gestures] if subjects: recs = [r for r in recs if r.subject_id in subjects] if not recs: self._preview_lbl.setText("No data matched current filters.") return
if self._radio_cross.isChecked(): tr_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._train_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] va_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._val_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] te_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._test_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] n_tr = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs if r.trial_label in tr_tags) n_va = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs if r.trial_label in va_tags) n_te = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs if r.trial_label in te_tags) txt = (f"Train: {n_tr:,} | Val: {n_va:,} | Test: {n_te:,}\n" f"{len(gestures)} classes, {len({r.subject_id for r in recs})} subjects") else: n_total = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs) vf = self._val_frac_spin.value() tf = self._test_frac_spin.value() n_te = int(n_total * tf) n_va = int(n_total * vf) n_tr = n_total - n_va - n_te txt = (f"Train: ~{n_tr:,} | Val: ~{n_va:,} | Test: ~{n_te:,}\n" f"(random stratified split)\n" f"{len(gestures)} classes, {len({r.subject_id for r in recs})} subjects") self._preview_lbl.setText(txt)
@Slot() def _on_train(self): if self._loader is None: return gestures = self._selected_gestures() if not gestures: QMessageBox.warning(self, "No gestures", "Select at least one gesture.") return subjects = self._selected_subjects() recs = [r for r in self._primary_recs() if r.gesture in gestures] if subjects: recs = [r for r in recs if r.subject_id in subjects]
# Build splits train_recs, val_recs, test_recs = self._build_splits(recs, gestures) if not train_recs: QMessageBox.warning(self, "No training data", "No files matched the training tags/split. " "Check your split settings.") return
self._log("=" * 56) self._log(f"Split: {'Cross-trial' if self._radio_cross.isChecked() else 'Combined'}") self._log(f"Gestures : {', '.join(gestures)}") if subjects: self._log(f"Subjects : {', '.join(subjects)}") self._log(f"Train files: {len(train_recs)} | " f"Val: {len(val_recs)} | Test: {len(test_recs)}")
# CV mode cv_map = {self._cv_none: "none", self._cv_kfold: "kfold", self._cv_loso: "loso"} cv_mode = next(k for btn, k in cv_map.items() if btn.isChecked())
# Normalisation norm_mode = self._norm_combo.currentData()
# Channel reduce ch_reduce = self._ch_reduce_combo.currentData()
# Augmentation augment = self._augment_cb.isChecked()
# Model mi = self._model_combo.currentIndex() model_type = _MODEL_TYPES[mi][1] ts_str = datetime.now().strftime("%H%M%S") model_name = (self._model_name_edit.text().strip() or f"q4_{model_type}_{ts_str}")
try: model = self._model_manager.create_model(model_type, name=model_name) except Exception as e: QMessageBox.critical(self, "Model creation failed", str(e)) return
feat_cfg = ({"mode": "raw", "features": []} if self._feat_combo.currentIndex() == 1 else {"mode": "default", "features": []})
sr = float(np.median([r.sampling_rate for r in recs])) ws, nc = self._primary_config() self._log(f"Model: {model_name} | Type: {model_type}") self._log(f"SR: {sr:.0f} Hz | Window: {ws} | Channels: {nc}") self._log(f"Norm: {norm_mode} | Augment: {augment} | CV: {cv_mode}")
self._train_btn.setEnabled(False) self._stop_btn.setEnabled(True) self._save_btn.setEnabled(False) self._export_btn.setEnabled(False) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(False) self._progress.setValue(0) self._live_canvas.reset() self._cv_table.setRowCount(0)
self._worker = _TrainWorker( loader=self._loader, train_recs=train_recs, test_recs=test_recs, val_recs=val_recs, model=model, feature_config=feat_cfg, sampling_rate=sr, window_size=ws, n_channels=nc, cv_mode=cv_mode, cv_folds=self._cv_k_spin.value(), norm_mode=norm_mode, augment=augment, noise_std=self._noise_spin.value(), time_shift=self._shift_spin.value(), channel_reduce=ch_reduce, channel_reduce_n=self._ch_n_spin.value(), ) self._worker.progress.connect(self._on_progress) self._worker.epoch_update.connect(self._on_epoch_update) self._worker.fold_result.connect(self._on_fold_result) self._worker.finished.connect(self._on_finished) self._worker.error.connect(self._on_error) self._worker.start()
def _build_splits(self, recs, gestures) -> Tuple[list, list, list]: """Return (train_recs, val_recs, test_recs).""" if self._radio_cross.isChecked(): tr_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._train_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] va_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._val_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] te_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._test_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] return ( [r for r in recs if r.trial_label in tr_tags], [r for r in recs if r.trial_label in va_tags], [r for r in recs if r.trial_label in te_tags], ) else: vf = self._val_frac_spin.value() tf = self._test_frac_spin.value() train, val, test = [], [], [] for g in gestures: g_recs = sorted([r for r in recs if r.gesture == g], key=lambda r: r.timestamp) n = len(g_recs) n_te = max(1, int(n * tf)) n_va = max(0, int(n * vf)) n_tr = max(1, n - n_te - n_va) train.extend(g_recs[:n_tr]) val.extend(g_recs[n_tr:n_tr+n_va]) test.extend(g_recs[n_tr+n_va:]) if not test: # Fallback for g in gestures: g_recs = [r for r in recs if r.gesture == g] if g_recs: test.append(g_recs[-1]) if g_recs[-1] in train: train.remove(g_recs[-1]) return train, val, test
@Slot() def _on_stop_training(self): if self._worker and self._worker.isRunning(): self._worker.terminate() self._worker = None self._status_lbl.setText("Training stopped by user.") self._train_btn.setEnabled(True) self._stop_btn.setEnabled(False) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(True) self._log("Training stopped by user.")
@Slot(int, str) def _on_progress(self, pct: int, msg: str): self._progress.setValue(pct) self._status_lbl.setText(msg) if pct % 10 == 0 or pct >= 100: self._log(msg)
@Slot(int, float, float, float, float) def _on_epoch_update(self, epoch: int, tl: float, vl: float, ta: float, va: float): self._live_canvas.add_epoch(epoch, tl, vl, ta, va)
@Slot(int, float) def _on_fold_result(self, fold_i: int, acc: float): row = self._cv_table.rowCount() self._cv_table.insertRow(row) cv_mode = "kfold" if self._cv_kfold.isChecked() else "loso" label = f"Fold {fold_i + 1}" if cv_mode == "kfold" else \ f"Subject {fold_i + 1}" self._cv_table.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(label)) acc_item = QTableWidgetItem(f"{acc:.2%}") acc_item.setForeground(QColor( _C["success"] if acc >= 0.80 else _C["warning"] if acc >= 0.60 else _C["danger"])) self._cv_table.setItem(row, 1, acc_item)
@Slot(object, object) def _on_finished(self, results: dict, model): self._results = results self._trained_model = model self._train_btn.setEnabled(True) self._stop_btn.setEnabled(False) self._save_btn.setEnabled(True) self._export_btn.setEnabled(True) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(True)
tr = results["train_acc"] val = results["val_acc"] tst = results["test_acc"] t = results["train_time"] n_tr = results["n_train"] n_va = results["n_val"] n_te = results["n_test"] cv_m = results.get("cv_mean") cv_s = results.get("cv_std")
# Update metric cards self._metric_cards["train_acc"].setText(f"{tr:.1%}") self._metric_cards["val_acc"].setText(f"{val:.1%}" if n_va > 0 else "N/A") self._metric_cards["test_acc"].setText(f"{tst:.1%}" if n_te > 0 else "N/A") self._metric_cards["cv_mean"].setText( f"{cv_m:.1%} ±{cv_s:.1%}" if cv_m is not None else "—")
banner_txt = f"Test Accuracy: {tst:.2%}" if n_te > 0 else f"Train Accuracy: {tr:.2%}" self._banner.setText(banner_txt)
self._summary_lbl.setText( f"Train:{n_tr:,} Val:{n_va:,} Test:{n_te:,} | " f"Training time: {t:.1f}s | " f"Norm: {results['norm_mode']} | " f"Channels used: {results['n_ch_final']}" )
self._log("=" * 56) self._log("RESULTS") self._log(f" Train acc : {tr:.2%} ({n_tr:,} windows)") self._log(f" Val acc : {val:.2%} ({n_va:,} windows)") self._log(f" Test acc : {tst:.2%} ({n_te:,} windows)") if cv_m is not None: self._log(f" CV mean : {cv_m:.2%} ±{cv_s:.2%}") self._log(f" Train time : {t:.2f}s") self._log("─" * 56)
# Per-class table self._results_table.setRowCount(0) label_names = results.get("label_names", {}) ci_low = results.get("ci_low", {}) ci_high = results.get("ci_high", {}) for cls_id in results["classes"]: acc = results["per_class_acc"].get(cls_id, 0.0) name = label_names.get(cls_id, str(cls_id)) row = self._results_table.rowCount() self._results_table.insertRow(row) self._results_table.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(name)) acc_item = QTableWidgetItem(f"{acc:.1%}") color = (_C["success"] if acc >= 0.80 else _C["warning"] if acc >= 0.60 else _C["danger"]) acc_item.setForeground(QColor(color)) self._results_table.setItem(row, 1, acc_item) lo = ci_low.get(cls_id, acc); hi = ci_high.get(cls_id, acc) self._results_table.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(f"[{lo:.1%}, {hi:.1%}]")) cm = results["confusion_matrix"] ci = results["classes"].index(cls_id) n_wins = cm[ci].sum() self._results_table.setItem(row, 3, QTableWidgetItem(str(n_wins))) # Bar cell bar_pct = int(acc * 100) bar_item = QTableWidgetItem() bar_item.setBackground(QBrush(QColor(color))) bar_item.setText(f"{'█' * (bar_pct // 5)}") bar_item.setForeground(QColor(color)) self._results_table.setItem(row, 4, bar_item) self._log(f" {name:18s}: {acc:.1%} CI=[{lo:.1%},{hi:.1%}] n={n_wins}")
# Per-subject table per_subj = results.get("per_subject", {}) self._subj_table.setRowCount(0) for subj, s_acc in sorted(per_subj.items()): r = self._subj_table.rowCount() self._subj_table.insertRow(r) self._subj_table.setItem(r, 0, QTableWidgetItem(subj)) ai = QTableWidgetItem(f"{s_acc:.1%}") ai.setForeground(QColor(_C["success"] if s_acc >= 0.80 else _C["warning"] if s_acc >= 0.60 else _C["danger"])) self._subj_table.setItem(r, 1, ai)
# CV summary cv_results = results.get("cv_results", []) if cv_results: self._cv_summary_lbl.setText( f"CV: mean={cv_m:.2%} std={cv_s:.2%} " f"min={min(cv_results):.2%} max={max(cv_results):.2%}")
# Confusion matrix classes = results["classes"] names_ord = [label_names.get(c, str(c)) for c in classes] mode_str = "Cross-trial" if self._radio_cross.isChecked() else "Combined" self._cm_canvas.plot( results["confusion_matrix"], names_ord, title=f"Confusion Matrix — {mode_str} | Test acc: {tst:.1%}")
# Add to comparison table run = _ModelRun( name=model.name if model else "?", model_type=_MODEL_TYPES[self._model_combo.currentIndex()][0], results=results, model=model, timestamp=datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")) self._all_runs.append(run) self._refresh_comparison()
# Switch to summary self._results_tabs.setCurrentIndex(0)
@Slot(str) def _on_error(self, msg: str): self._train_btn.setEnabled(True) self._stop_btn.setEnabled(False) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(True) self._log(f"ERROR: {msg}") QMessageBox.critical(self, "Training failed", msg[:800])
@Slot() def _on_save_model(self): if self._trained_model is None: return try: save_path = self._model_manager.models_dir / self._trained_model.name self._trained_model.save(save_path) self._log(f"Model saved → {save_path}") QMessageBox.information(self, "Saved", f"Model '{self._trained_model.name}' saved.\n" "It will appear in the Training tab after clicking Refresh.") if hasattr(self.parent(), "_refresh_models"): self.parent()._refresh_models() except Exception as e: self._log(f"Save error: {e}") QMessageBox.critical(self, "Save failed", str(e))
@Slot() def _on_export_csv(self): if self._results is None: return path, _ = QFileDialog.getSaveFileName( self, "Export Results CSV", str(self._data_dir / "results.csv"), "CSV Files (*.csv)") if not path: return try: with open(path, "w", newline="") as fh: wr = csv.writer(fh) r = self._results ln = r.get("label_names", {}) wr.writerow(["Metric", "Value"]) wr.writerow(["train_acc", f"{r['train_acc']:.4f}"]) wr.writerow(["val_acc", f"{r['val_acc']:.4f}"]) wr.writerow(["test_acc", f"{r['test_acc']:.4f}"]) wr.writerow(["train_time", f"{r['train_time']:.2f}s"]) wr.writerow(["n_train", r["n_train"]]) wr.writerow(["n_val", r["n_val"]]) wr.writerow(["n_test", r["n_test"]]) if r.get("cv_mean") is not None: wr.writerow(["cv_mean", f"{r['cv_mean']:.4f}"]) wr.writerow(["cv_std", f"{r['cv_std']:.4f}"]) wr.writerow([]) wr.writerow(["Class", "Accuracy", "CI_low", "CI_high", "N_windows"]) for cls_id in r["classes"]: name = ln.get(cls_id, str(cls_id)) acc = r["per_class_acc"].get(cls_id, 0.0) lo = r.get("ci_low", {}).get(cls_id, acc) hi = r.get("ci_high", {}).get(cls_id, acc) cm = r["confusion_matrix"] ci = r["classes"].index(cls_id) wr.writerow([name, f"{acc:.4f}", f"{lo:.4f}", f"{hi:.4f}", cm[ci].sum()]) wr.writerow([]) wr.writerow(["cv_fold", "accuracy"]) for i, a in enumerate(r.get("cv_results", [])): wr.writerow([i+1, f"{a:.4f}"]) self._log(f"Results exported → {path}") QMessageBox.information(self, "Exported", f"Saved to:\n{path}") except Exception as e: QMessageBox.critical(self, "Export failed", str(e))
@Slot() def _on_learning_curve(self): """Compute and plot a learning curve: accuracy vs. training file count.""" if self._loader is None or self._trained_model is None: QMessageBox.information(self, "Learning Curve", "Train a model first, then run the learning curve.") return
gestures = self._selected_gestures() subjects = self._selected_subjects() recs = [r for r in self._primary_recs() if r.gesture in gestures] if subjects: recs = [r for r in recs if r.subject_id in subjects]
train_recs, _, test_recs = self._build_splits(recs, gestures) if not train_recs or not test_recs: QMessageBox.warning(self, "No data", "Need train and test files.") return
ws, nc = self._primary_config() sr = float(np.median([r.sampling_rate for r in recs])) mi = self._model_combo.currentIndex() model_type = _MODEL_TYPES[mi][1] norm_mode = self._norm_combo.currentData() feat_cfg = ({"mode": "raw"} if self._feat_combo.currentIndex() == 1 else {"mode": "default"})
self._status_lbl.setText("Computing learning curve…")
steps = [int(len(train_recs) * f) for f in [0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.85, 1.0]] steps = sorted(set(max(1, s) for s in steps))
# Load test once def load_all(r_list): from playagain_pipeline.gui.widgets.quattrocento_loader import QuattrocentoFileLoader g_set = sorted({r.gesture for r in r_list}, key=lambda g: _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER.index(g) if g in _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER else 999) g2l = {g: i for i, g in enumerate(g_set)} total = sum(r.n_windows for r in r_list) X = np.empty((total, ws, nc), dtype=np.float32) y_out = np.empty(total, dtype=np.int64) wp = 0 for rec in r_list: wins = QuattrocentoFileLoader.load_windows(rec, True) lbl = g2l[rec.gesture] for w in wins: X[wp] = _resize_window(w, ws, nc) y_out[wp] = lbl wp += 1 return X[:wp], y_out[:wp]
X_te, y_te = load_all(test_recs) tr_accs, te_accs, win_counts = [], [], []
for step in steps: sub_recs = train_recs[:step] X_tr, y_tr = load_all(sub_recs) X_tr2, X_te2 = _normalise(X_tr, X_te, norm_mode) try: m = self._model_manager.create_model(model_type, name=f"__lc_{step}__") m.train(X_tr2, y_tr, window_size_ms=round(ws/sr*1000,1), sampling_rate=sr, num_channels=nc, feature_config=feat_cfg) tr_accs.append(float(np.mean(m.predict(X_tr2) == y_tr))) te_accs.append(float(np.mean(m.predict(X_te2) == y_te))) win_counts.append(len(X_tr2)) except Exception: tr_accs.append(0.0); te_accs.append(0.0); win_counts.append(len(X_tr))
self._lc_canvas.plot(win_counts, tr_accs, te_accs, title=f"Learning Curve — {model_type}") self._results_tabs.setCurrentIndex(3) self._status_lbl.setText("Learning curve ready.")
def _refresh_comparison(self): """Refresh the model comparison table sorted by test accuracy.""" runs_sorted = sorted(self._all_runs, key=lambda r: r.results["test_acc"], reverse=True) self._cmp_table.setRowCount(0) for i, run in enumerate(runs_sorted): r = run.results row = self._cmp_table.rowCount() self._cmp_table.insertRow(row) self._cmp_table.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(run.name)) self._cmp_table.setItem(row, 1, QTableWidgetItem(run.model_type)) for col, val in enumerate([r["train_acc"], r["val_acc"], r["test_acc"]], start=2): it = QTableWidgetItem(f"{val:.1%}") it.setForeground(QColor( _C["success"] if val >= 0.80 else _C["warning"] if val >= 0.60 else _C["danger"])) self._cmp_table.setItem(row, col, it) cv_m = r.get("cv_mean") self._cmp_table.setItem(row, 5, QTableWidgetItem( f"{cv_m:.1%}" if cv_m is not None else "—")) self._cmp_table.setItem(row, 6, QTableWidgetItem( f"{r['train_time']:.1f}s")) if i == 0: # Best model for c in range(self._cmp_table.columnCount()): it = self._cmp_table.item(row, c) if it: it.setBackground(QBrush(QColor("#1a2e1a")))
@Slot() def _on_clear_comparison(self): self._all_runs.clear() self._cmp_table.setRowCount(0)
@Slot() def _on_save_selected_from_comparison(self): row = self._cmp_table.currentRow() if row < 0: QMessageBox.information(self, "No selection", "Select a row in the comparison table first.") return runs_sorted = sorted(self._all_runs, key=lambda r: r.results["test_acc"], reverse=True) if row >= len(runs_sorted): return run = runs_sorted[row] try: save_path = self._model_manager.models_dir / run.model.name run.model.save(save_path) self._log(f"Saved '{run.model.name}' from comparison table → {save_path}") if hasattr(self.parent(), "_refresh_models"): self.parent()._refresh_models() QMessageBox.information(self, "Saved", f"Model '{run.model.name}' saved successfully.") except Exception as e: QMessageBox.critical(self, "Save failed", str(e))
def _log(self, msg: str): ts = datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S") if "error" in msg.lower(): color = _C["danger"] elif any(k in msg.lower() for k in ("complete", "saved", "done", "result", "acc")): color = _C["success"] elif any(k in msg.lower() for k in ("warning", "warn", "skip")): color = _C["warning"] else: color = _C["text"] ts_html = f'<span style="color:{_C["muted"]};">[{ts}]</span>' msg_html = f'<span style="color:{color};">{msg}</span>' self._log_text.append(f"{ts_html} {msg_html}")

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
""" QuattrocentoTrainingDialog (v2 – Professional ML Suite) ========================================================= Train, validate, and evaluate gesture-recognition models on Quattrocento HD-EMG data with a full professional ML workflow.
New in v2 ---------- • Subject-aware cross-validation (Leave-One-Subject-Out / K-Fold) • Per-subject performance breakdown in results • Validation split (train / val / test — 3-way) • Normalisation options (z-score per channel, global, none) • Channel selection / reduction (PCA, top-N by variance) • Window augmentation (Gaussian noise, time-shift) • Live training curves for deep models (loss + accuracy) • Learning-curve tab (accuracy vs. #training files) • Per-gesture confidence interval bars in results table • Export results to CSV • Model-comparison table (train multiple → rank by test acc) • Hardware config auto-detection with override UI """
from __future__ import annotations
import csv import io import threading import time from copy import deepcopy from datetime import datetime from pathlib import Path from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple, Any
import numpy as np
from PySide6.QtCore import Qt, Signal, Slot, QThread, QTimer from PySide6.QtWidgets import ( QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QFormLayout, QGroupBox, QLabel, QPushButton, QLineEdit, QFileDialog, QComboBox, QCheckBox, QListWidget, QListWidgetItem, QProgressBar, QTextEdit, QSpinBox, QTableWidget, QTableWidgetItem, QHeaderView, QSplitter, QTabWidget, QWidget, QMessageBox, QAbstractItemView, QRadioButton, QButtonGroup, QScrollArea, QDoubleSpinBox, QFrame, QToolButton, ) from PySide6.QtGui import QFont, QColor, QBrush, QPalette
from matplotlib.figure import Figure from matplotlib.backends.backend_qtagg import FigureCanvasQTAgg
# ─── constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
_DEFAULT_PRIMARY_CONFIG: Tuple[int, int] = (408, 64) # (window_size, n_channels)
_MODEL_TYPES = [ ("SVM", "svm"), ("LDA", "lda"), ("Random Forest", "random_forest"), ("CatBoost", "catboost"), ("MLP", "mlp"), ("CNN", "cnn"), ("AttentionNet", "attention_net"), ("MSTNet", "mstnet"), ]
_DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER = [ "rest", "power_grasp", "pinch", "tripod_pinch", "thumb", "index", "middle", "ring", "pinky", "open_hand", "wrist_flex", "wrist_extend", "pronation", "supination", ]
# ─── colour palette (dark-mode friendly) ─────────────────────────────────────
_C = { "bg": "#1e1e2e", "panel": "#2a2a3e", "accent": "#7c3aed", "accent2": "#06b6d4", "success": "#22c55e", "warning": "#f59e0b", "danger": "#ef4444", "text": "#e2e8f0", "muted": "#94a3b8", "border": "#3f3f5c", }
_PANEL_STYLE = f""" QGroupBox {{ background: {_C['panel']}; border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; color: {_C['text']}; padding-top: 16px; margin-top: 6px; }} QGroupBox::title {{ subcontrol-origin: margin; left: 10px; padding: 0 6px; color: {_C['accent2']}; }} """ _BTN_PRIMARY = f""" QPushButton {{ background: {_C['accent']}; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 18px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; }} QPushButton:hover {{ background: #6d28d9; }} QPushButton:disabled {{ background: #3f3f5c; color: #6b7280; }} """ _BTN_SECONDARY = f""" QPushButton {{ background: {_C['panel']}; color: {_C['text']}; border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; border-radius: 6px; padding: 5px 14px; }} QPushButton:hover {{ border-color: {_C['accent2']}; color: {_C['accent2']}; }} """
# ─── data helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _resize_window(w: np.ndarray, target_ws: int, target_nc: int) -> np.ndarray: ws, nc = w.shape if nc > target_nc: w = w[:, :target_nc] elif nc < target_nc: w = np.concatenate([w, np.zeros((ws, target_nc - nc), dtype=w.dtype)], 1) if ws > target_ws: return w[:target_ws] elif ws < target_ws: pad = np.zeros((target_ws - ws, w.shape[1]), dtype=w.dtype) return np.concatenate([w, pad], 0) return w
def _augment_windows(X: np.ndarray, noise_std: float = 0.005, time_shift: int = 0) -> np.ndarray: """Simple augmentation: additive Gaussian noise + optional circular time-shift.""" aug = X.copy() if noise_std > 0: aug += np.random.randn(*aug.shape).astype(np.float32) * noise_std if time_shift > 0: shift = np.random.randint(-time_shift, time_shift + 1, size=len(aug)) for i, s in enumerate(shift): if s != 0: aug[i] = np.roll(aug[i], s, axis=0) return aug
def _normalise(X_train: np.ndarray, X_test: np.ndarray, mode: str) -> Tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray]: """Normalise using statistics from X_train only.""" if mode == "none": return X_train, X_test if mode == "z_channel": mu = X_train.mean(axis=(0, 1), keepdims=True) # (1,1,C) sd = X_train.std(axis=(0, 1), keepdims=True).clip(min=1e-8) elif mode == "z_global": mu = X_train.mean() sd = max(X_train.std(), 1e-8) else: return X_train, X_test return (X_train - mu) / sd, (X_test - mu) / sd
# ─── background worker ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
class _TrainWorker(QThread): """ Full training pipeline: load → augment → normalise → (optional CV) → train → evaluate """
progress = Signal(int, str) epoch_update = Signal(int, float, float, float, float) fold_result = Signal(int, float) # fold_idx, fold_acc finished = Signal(object, object) # results_dict, model error = Signal(str)
def __init__( self, loader, train_recs: list, test_recs: list, val_recs: list, model, feature_config: dict, sampling_rate: float, window_size: int, n_channels: int, cv_mode: str, # "none" | "kfold" | "loso" cv_folds: int, norm_mode: str, # "none" | "z_channel" | "z_global" augment: bool, noise_std: float, time_shift: int, channel_reduce: str, # "none" | "variance_top_n" | "pca" channel_reduce_n: int, ): super().__init__() self._loader = loader self._train_recs = train_recs self._test_recs = test_recs self._val_recs = val_recs self._model = model self._feat_cfg = feature_config self._sr = sampling_rate self._ws = window_size self._nc = n_channels self._cv_mode = cv_mode self._cv_folds = cv_folds self._norm = norm_mode self._augment = augment self._noise_std = noise_std self._time_shift = time_shift self._ch_reduce = channel_reduce self._ch_n = channel_reduce_n
def run(self): try: from playagain_pipeline.gui.widgets.quattrocento_loader import QuattrocentoFileLoader
# ── Load data ────────────────────────────────────────────────── self.progress.emit(5, "Loading training data…") X_train, y_train, label_names = self._load(self._train_recs) self.progress.emit(18, f"Loaded {len(X_train):,} training windows")
X_test, y_test, _ = self._load(self._test_recs) if self._test_recs else ( np.empty((0, self._ws, self._nc), np.float32), np.empty(0, np.int64), label_names)
X_val, y_val, _ = self._load(self._val_recs) if self._val_recs else ( np.empty((0, self._ws, self._nc), np.float32), np.empty(0, np.int64), label_names)
self.progress.emit(28, f"Train:{len(X_train):,} Val:{len(X_val):,} Test:{len(X_test):,}")
# ── Augment ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── if self._augment and len(X_train) > 0: self.progress.emit(30, "Augmenting training windows…") aug = _augment_windows(X_train, self._noise_std, self._time_shift) X_train = np.concatenate([X_train, aug], 0) y_train = np.concatenate([y_train, y_train], 0) self.progress.emit(33, f"After augmentation: {len(X_train):,} windows")
# ── Channel reduction ────────────────────────────────────────── ch_reducer = None if self._ch_reduce != "none" and len(X_train) > 0: X_train, X_val, X_test, ch_reducer = self._apply_channel_reduce( X_train, X_val, X_test) self.progress.emit(36, f"Channel reduction → {X_train.shape[2]} channels")
# ── Normalise ────────────────────────────────────────────────── if len(X_test) > 0: X_train, X_test = _normalise(X_train, X_test, self._norm) if len(X_val) > 0: X_train, X_val = _normalise(X_train, X_val, self._norm)
# ── Cross-validation (optional) ──────────────────────────────── cv_results: List[float] = [] if self._cv_mode == "kfold" and len(X_train) > 0: cv_results = self._run_kfold(X_train, y_train, label_names) elif self._cv_mode == "loso": cv_results = self._run_loso(label_names)
# ── Final model training ─────────────────────────────────────── self.progress.emit(55, "Training final model…") t0 = time.time()
_stop = threading.Event() def _sim(): p = 57 while not _stop.is_set() and p < 88: self.progress.emit(p, "Training final model…") _stop.wait(0.35) p = min(p + 2, 88) sim_t = threading.Thread(target=_sim, daemon=True) sim_t.start()
n_ch_final = X_train.shape[2]
def _epoch_cb(epoch, tl, vl, ta=0.0, va=0.0): self.epoch_update.emit(epoch, tl, vl, ta, va)
# Use validation split if available, else fall back to internal split if len(X_val) > 0: results = self._model.train( X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val, window_size_ms=round(self._ws / self._sr * 1000, 1), sampling_rate=self._sr, num_channels=n_ch_final, feature_config=self._feat_cfg, callback=_epoch_cb, ) else: results = self._model.train( X_train, y_train, window_size_ms=round(self._ws / self._sr * 1000, 1), sampling_rate=self._sr, num_channels=n_ch_final, feature_config=self._feat_cfg, callback=_epoch_cb, )
_stop.set(); sim_t.join(1) train_time = time.time() - t0 self.progress.emit(90, "Evaluating on test set…")
# ── Evaluation ──────────────────────────────────────────────── if len(X_test) > 0: y_pred = self._model.predict(X_test) test_acc = float(np.mean(y_pred == y_test)) classes = sorted(set(y_test)) n_cls = len(classes) conf_mat = np.zeros((n_cls, n_cls), dtype=int) for tr, pr in zip(y_test, y_pred): ti = classes.index(tr) pi = classes.index(pr) if pr in classes else 0 conf_mat[ti, pi] += 1 per_class = {c: (conf_mat[i, i] / conf_mat[i].sum() if conf_mat[i].sum() else 0.0) for i, c in enumerate(classes)} # 95% Wilson CI per class ci_low, ci_high = {}, {} for i, c in enumerate(classes): n = int(conf_mat[i].sum()) p = per_class[c] if n > 0: z = 1.96 denom = 1 + z**2 / n centre = (p + z**2 / (2*n)) / denom margin = z * np.sqrt(p*(1-p)/n + z**2/(4*n**2)) / denom ci_low[c] = max(0.0, centre - margin) ci_high[c] = min(1.0, centre + margin) else: ci_low[c] = ci_high[c] = 0.0
# Per-subject breakdown (if subject info available) per_subject: Dict[str, float] = {} if hasattr(self._test_recs[0] if self._test_recs else None, "subject_id"): per_subject = self._per_subject_acc(X_test, y_test) else: test_acc = 0.0 classes = sorted(set(y_train)) n_cls = len(classes) conf_mat = np.zeros((n_cls, n_cls), dtype=int) per_class = {c: 0.0 for c in classes} ci_low = ci_high = {c: 0.0 for c in classes} per_subject = {}
# Update model metadata if hasattr(self._model, "metadata") and self._model.metadata is not None: self._model.metadata.class_names = label_names self._model.metadata.num_channels = n_ch_final self._model.metadata.sampling_rate = int(self._sr) self._model.metadata.window_samples = self._ws
results_out = { "train_acc": results.get("training_accuracy", 0.0), "val_acc": results.get("validation_accuracy", 0.0), "test_acc": test_acc, "train_time": train_time, "n_train": len(X_train), "n_val": len(X_val), "n_test": len(X_test), "confusion_matrix": conf_mat, "classes": classes, "per_class_acc": per_class, "ci_low": ci_low, "ci_high": ci_high, "per_subject": per_subject, "label_names": label_names, "cv_results": cv_results, "cv_mean": float(np.mean(cv_results)) if cv_results else None, "cv_std": float(np.std(cv_results)) if cv_results else None, "augmented": self._augment, "norm_mode": self._norm, "ch_reduce": self._ch_reduce, "n_ch_final": n_ch_final, }
self.progress.emit(100, "Done") self.finished.emit(results_out, self._model)
except Exception as exc: import traceback self.error.emit(f"{exc}\n\n{traceback.format_exc()}")
# ── loaders ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _load(self, recs: list) -> Tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, Dict[int, str]]: from playagain_pipeline.gui.widgets.quattrocento_loader import QuattrocentoFileLoader gestures = sorted({r.gesture for r in recs}, key=lambda g: _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER.index(g) if g in _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER else 999) g2l = {g: i for i, g in enumerate(gestures)} label_names = {int(v): k for k, v in g2l.items()} total = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs) X = np.empty((total, self._ws, self._nc), dtype=np.float32) y = np.empty(total, dtype=np.int64) wp = 0 for rec in recs: wins = QuattrocentoFileLoader.load_windows(rec, apply_conversion=True) lbl = g2l[rec.gesture] for w in wins: X[wp] = _resize_window(w, self._ws, self._nc) y[wp] = lbl wp += 1 return X[:wp], y[:wp], label_names
def _apply_channel_reduce(self, X_tr, X_v, X_te): n_keep = min(self._ch_n, X_tr.shape[2]) if self._ch_reduce == "variance_top_n": var = X_tr.var(axis=(0, 1)) idx = np.argsort(var)[::-1][:n_keep] idx = np.sort(idx) return X_tr[:, :, idx], (X_v[:, :, idx] if len(X_v) else X_v), \ (X_te[:, :, idx] if len(X_te) else X_te), idx elif self._ch_reduce == "pca": from sklearn.decomposition import PCA flat_tr = X_tr.reshape(len(X_tr), -1) pca = PCA(n_components=n_keep, svd_solver="randomized", random_state=42) flat_tr2 = pca.fit_transform(flat_tr) flat_v = pca.transform(X_v.reshape(len(X_v), -1)) if len(X_v) else np.empty((0, n_keep)) flat_te = pca.transform(X_te.reshape(len(X_te), -1)) if len(X_te) else np.empty((0, n_keep)) # reshape back to (N, 1, n_keep) so downstream code is uniform def _rs(a, n): return a.reshape(len(a), 1, n) return _rs(flat_tr2.astype(np.float32), n_keep), \ _rs(flat_v.astype(np.float32), n_keep), \ _rs(flat_te.astype(np.float32), n_keep), pca return X_tr, X_v, X_te, None
def _run_kfold(self, X: np.ndarray, y: np.ndarray, label_names: dict) -> List[float]: from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold from sklearn.base import clone skf = StratifiedKFold(n_splits=self._cv_folds, shuffle=True, random_state=42) accs = [] for fold_i, (tr_idx, va_idx) in enumerate(skf.split(X, y)): self.progress.emit(38 + fold_i * 3, f"CV fold {fold_i + 1}/{self._cv_folds}…") Xf_tr, yf_tr = X[tr_idx], y[tr_idx] Xf_va, yf_va = X[va_idx], y[va_idx] Xf_tr, Xf_va = _normalise(Xf_tr, Xf_va, self._norm) try: m = self._model_manager.create_model( self._model_type, name=f"__cv_fold_{fold_i}__") m.train(Xf_tr, yf_tr, Xf_va, yf_va, window_size_ms=round(self._ws / self._sr * 1000, 1), sampling_rate=self._sr, num_channels=Xf_tr.shape[2], feature_config=self._feat_cfg) acc = float(np.mean(m.predict(Xf_va) == yf_va)) except Exception: acc = 0.0 accs.append(acc) self.fold_result.emit(fold_i, acc) return accs
def _run_loso(self, label_names: dict) -> List[float]: """Leave-One-Subject-Out CV — uses self._train_recs + self._test_recs.""" all_recs = self._train_recs + self._test_recs subjects = sorted({r.subject_id for r in all_recs}) accs = [] for si, subj in enumerate(subjects): self.progress.emit(38 + si * 3, f"LOSO: leaving out {subj} ({si+1}/{len(subjects)})…") train_r = [r for r in all_recs if r.subject_id != subj] test_r = [r for r in all_recs if r.subject_id == subj] if not train_r or not test_r: continue Xtr, ytr, _ = self._load(train_r) Xte, yte, _ = self._load(test_r) Xtr, Xte = _normalise(Xtr, Xte, self._norm) try: m = self._model_manager.create_model( self._model_type, name=f"__loso_{subj}__") m.train(Xtr, ytr, window_size_ms=round(self._ws/self._sr*1000,1), sampling_rate=self._sr, num_channels=Xtr.shape[2], feature_config=self._feat_cfg) acc = float(np.mean(m.predict(Xte) == yte)) except Exception: acc = 0.0 accs.append(acc) self.fold_result.emit(si, acc) return accs
def _per_subject_acc(self, X_test: np.ndarray, y_test: np.ndarray) -> Dict[str, float]: """Compute per-subject accuracy using test_recs subject assignments.""" result = {} if not self._test_recs: return result wp = 0 for rec in self._test_recs: n = rec.n_windows if wp + n > len(X_test): break X_s = X_test[wp:wp+n] y_s = y_test[wp:wp+n] wp += n try: pred = self._model.predict(X_s) result[rec.subject_id] = float(np.mean(pred == y_s)) except Exception: pass return result
# ─── matplotlib canvases ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
class _ConfusionMatrixCanvas(FigureCanvasQTAgg): def __init__(self, parent=None): self._fig = Figure(figsize=(5, 4), dpi=88, facecolor="#1a1a2e") super().__init__(self._fig) self.setParent(parent)
def plot(self, conf_mat: np.ndarray, class_names: List[str], title: str = ""): self._fig.clear() ax = self._fig.add_subplot(111, facecolor="#1a1a2e") row_sums = conf_mat.sum(1, keepdims=True).clip(min=1) cm_pct = conf_mat / row_sums * 100 im = ax.imshow(cm_pct, cmap="Blues", vmin=0, vmax=100) cbar = self._fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax, fraction=0.046, pad=0.04) cbar.set_label("%", color="#e2e8f0", fontsize=8) cbar.ax.yaxis.set_tick_params(color="#e2e8f0", labelcolor="#e2e8f0") n = len(class_names) ax.set_xticks(range(n)); ax.set_yticks(range(n)) ax.set_xticklabels(class_names, rotation=40, ha="right", fontsize=7, color="#e2e8f0") ax.set_yticklabels(class_names, fontsize=7, color="#e2e8f0") ax.set_xlabel("Predicted", fontsize=8, color="#94a3b8") ax.set_ylabel("True", fontsize=8, color="#94a3b8") ax.set_title(title, fontsize=9, color="#e2e8f0", pad=8) ax.tick_params(colors="#94a3b8") for spine in ax.spines.values(): spine.set_edgecolor("#3f3f5c") thresh = 50 for i in range(n): for j in range(n): col = "white" if cm_pct[i,j] > thresh else "#94a3b8" ax.text(j, i, f"{cm_pct[i,j]:.0f}%\n({conf_mat[i,j]})", ha="center", va="center", fontsize=6, color=col) self._fig.tight_layout(pad=1.0) self.draw()
class _LearningCurveCanvas(FigureCanvasQTAgg): """Accuracy vs. #training windows curve.""" def __init__(self, parent=None): self._fig = Figure(figsize=(5, 3), dpi=88, facecolor="#1a1a2e") super().__init__(self._fig) self.setParent(parent)
def plot(self, sizes: List[int], train_accs: List[float], val_accs: List[float], title: str = "Learning Curve"): self._fig.clear() ax = self._fig.add_subplot(111, facecolor="#1a1a2e") ax.plot(sizes, train_accs, "o-", color="#22c55e", lw=2, label="Train", ms=4) ax.plot(sizes, val_accs, "s-", color="#f59e0b", lw=2, label="Val/Test", ms=4) ax.set_xlabel("Training windows", fontsize=8, color="#94a3b8") ax.set_ylabel("Accuracy", fontsize=8, color="#94a3b8") ax.set_title(title, fontsize=9, color="#e2e8f0") ax.set_ylim(0, 1.05) ax.tick_params(colors="#94a3b8") ax.legend(framealpha=0.3, fontsize=7, labelcolor="#e2e8f0") for spine in ax.spines.values(): spine.set_edgecolor("#3f3f5c") ax.set_facecolor("#1a1a2e") self._fig.tight_layout(pad=1.0) self.draw()
class _LiveCurveCanvas(FigureCanvasQTAgg): """Live epoch-by-epoch loss and accuracy curves.""" def __init__(self, parent=None): self._fig = Figure(figsize=(5, 3), dpi=88, facecolor="#1a1a2e") super().__init__(self._fig) self.setParent(parent) self._epochs: List[int] = [] self._tl: List[float] = [] self._vl: List[float] = [] self._ta: List[float] = [] self._va: List[float] = []
def reset(self): self._epochs = []; self._tl = []; self._vl = [] self._ta = []; self._va = [] self._fig.clear() self.draw()
def add_epoch(self, epoch: int, tl: float, vl: float, ta: float, va: float): self._epochs.append(epoch) self._tl.append(tl); self._vl.append(vl) self._ta.append(ta); self._va.append(va) self._redraw()
def _redraw(self): self._fig.clear() ax1 = self._fig.add_subplot(121, facecolor="#1a1a2e") ax1.plot(self._epochs, self._tl, color="#22c55e", lw=1.5, label="Train loss") ax1.plot(self._epochs, self._vl, color="#ef4444", lw=1.5, label="Val loss") ax1.set_title("Loss", fontsize=8, color="#e2e8f0") ax1.tick_params(colors="#94a3b8", labelsize=7) ax1.legend(fontsize=6, framealpha=0.3, labelcolor="#e2e8f0")
ax2 = self._fig.add_subplot(122, facecolor="#1a1a2e") ax2.plot(self._epochs, self._ta, color="#22c55e", lw=1.5, label="Train acc") ax2.plot(self._epochs, self._va, color="#f59e0b", lw=1.5, label="Val acc") ax2.set_title("Accuracy", fontsize=8, color="#e2e8f0") ax2.set_ylim(0, 1.05) ax2.tick_params(colors="#94a3b8", labelsize=7) ax2.legend(fontsize=6, framealpha=0.3, labelcolor="#e2e8f0")
for ax in (ax1, ax2): for sp in ax.spines.values(): sp.set_edgecolor("#3f3f5c")
self._fig.tight_layout(pad=0.8) self.draw()
# ─── model comparison entry ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
class _ModelRun: """Holds metadata for one completed training run.""" def __init__(self, name: str, model_type: str, results: dict, model, timestamp: str): self.name = name self.model_type = model_type self.results = results self.model = model self.timestamp = timestamp
# ─── main dialog ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
class QuattrocentoTrainingDialog(QDialog): """ Professional ML training dialog for Quattrocento HD-EMG data.
Supports: • 3-way train / val / test split or cross-trial tagging • K-Fold & Leave-One-Subject-Out cross-validation • Data augmentation (Gaussian noise, time-shift) • Per-channel or global z-score normalisation • Channel selection (top-N variance, PCA) • Live training curves (loss + accuracy) • Learning curve analysis • Per-class CI bars, per-subject breakdown • Multi-run model comparison table • Export results to CSV """
def __init__(self, model_manager, data_dir: Path, parent=None): super().__init__(parent) self._model_manager = model_manager self._data_dir = Path(data_dir) self._loader = None self._worker = None self._trained_model = None self._results = None self._all_runs: List[_ModelRun] = []
self.setWindowTitle("Quattrocento Training & Evaluation | Professional ML Suite") self.setMinimumSize(1200, 780) self._apply_dark_theme() self._setup_ui() self._try_auto_detect()
def _apply_dark_theme(self): self.setStyleSheet(f""" QDialog, QWidget {{ background: {_C['bg']}; color: {_C['text']}; font-size: 12px; }} QTabWidget::pane {{ border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; border-radius: 6px; background: {_C['panel']}; }} QTabBar::tab {{ background: {_C['bg']}; color: {_C['muted']}; padding: 6px 16px; border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; border-bottom: none; border-top-left-radius: 5px; border-top-right-radius: 5px; margin-right: 2px; }} QTabBar::tab:selected {{ background: {_C['panel']}; color: {_C['accent2']}; border-color: {_C['accent2']}; }} QListWidget, QTableWidget, QTextEdit {{ background: {_C['bg']}; color: {_C['text']}; border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; border-radius: 5px; selection-background-color: {_C['accent']}; }} QComboBox, QLineEdit, QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox {{ background: {_C['bg']}; color: {_C['text']}; border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 6px; }} QComboBox:hover, QLineEdit:focus, QSpinBox:focus, QDoubleSpinBox:focus {{ border-color: {_C['accent2']}; }} QComboBox::drop-down {{ border: none; }} QProgressBar {{ background: {_C['bg']}; border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; border-radius: 4px; height: 14px; text-align: center; color: {_C['text']}; }} QProgressBar::chunk {{ background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:0, stop:0 {_C['accent']}, stop:1 {_C['accent2']}); border-radius: 3px; }} QCheckBox, QRadioButton {{ color: {_C['text']}; spacing: 6px; }} QCheckBox::indicator, QRadioButton::indicator {{ border: 1px solid {_C['border']}; background: {_C['bg']}; border-radius: 3px; width: 13px; height: 13px; }} QCheckBox::indicator:checked, QRadioButton::indicator:checked {{ background: {_C['accent']}; border-color: {_C['accent']}; }} QHeaderView::section {{ background: {_C['panel']}; color: {_C['muted']}; border: none; padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 11px; }} QSplitter::handle {{ background: {_C['border']}; width: 1px; }} QScrollBar:vertical {{ background: {_C['bg']}; width: 8px; margin: 0; }} QScrollBar::handle:vertical {{ background: {_C['border']}; border-radius: 4px; min-height: 20px; }} """)
# ─── UI construction ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _setup_ui(self): root = QHBoxLayout(self) root.setContentsMargins(8, 8, 8, 8) root.setSpacing(8)
# ── Left panel: configuration ───────────────────────────────────────── left_scroll = QScrollArea() left_scroll.setWidgetResizable(True) left_scroll.setFixedWidth(390) left_scroll.setFrameShape(QFrame.Shape.NoFrame) left_content = QWidget() left_lay = QVBoxLayout(left_content) left_lay.setContentsMargins(4, 4, 4, 4) left_lay.setSpacing(8) left_scroll.setWidget(left_content) root.addWidget(left_scroll)
# Data root root_grp = QGroupBox("Data Root") root_grp.setStyleSheet(_PANEL_STYLE) rgl = QVBoxLayout(root_grp) dir_row = QHBoxLayout() self._root_edit = QLineEdit() self._root_edit.setPlaceholderText("Path to quattrocento folder…") self._root_edit.setReadOnly(True) dir_row.addWidget(self._root_edit) browse_btn = QPushButton("…") browse_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) browse_btn.setFixedWidth(34) browse_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_browse) dir_row.addWidget(browse_btn) rgl.addLayout(dir_row)
scan_row = QHBoxLayout() self._scan_btn = QPushButton("Scan Directory") self._scan_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) self._scan_btn.setFixedHeight(28) self._scan_btn.setEnabled(False) self._scan_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_scan) scan_row.addWidget(self._scan_btn)
# Hardware config override hw_lbl = QLabel("Config (ws × ch):") hw_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") scan_row.addWidget(hw_lbl) self._ws_spin = QSpinBox() self._ws_spin.setRange(1, 2048) self._ws_spin.setValue(_DEFAULT_PRIMARY_CONFIG[0]) self._ws_spin.setMaximumWidth(58) scan_row.addWidget(self._ws_spin) lbl_x = QLabel("×") lbl_x.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};") scan_row.addWidget(lbl_x) self._nc_spin = QSpinBox() self._nc_spin.setRange(1, 512) self._nc_spin.setValue(_DEFAULT_PRIMARY_CONFIG[1]) self._nc_spin.setMaximumWidth(52) scan_row.addWidget(self._nc_spin) rgl.addLayout(scan_row)
self._scan_info = QLabel("No directory selected.") self._scan_info.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") self._scan_info.setWordWrap(True) rgl.addWidget(self._scan_info) left_lay.addWidget(root_grp)
# Gesture selection gest_grp = QGroupBox("Gestures") gest_grp.setStyleSheet(_PANEL_STYLE) gest_lay = QVBoxLayout(gest_grp) self._gest_list = QListWidget() self._gest_list.setSelectionMode(QAbstractItemView.SelectionMode.MultiSelection) self._gest_list.setMaximumHeight(130) self._gest_list.itemSelectionChanged.connect(self._update_preview) gest_lay.addWidget(self._gest_list) gb_row = QHBoxLayout() for lbl, fn in [("All", self._gest_list.selectAll), ("None", self._gest_list.clearSelection)]: b = QPushButton(lbl) b.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) b.setFixedHeight(22) b.clicked.connect(fn) gb_row.addWidget(b) gest_lay.addLayout(gb_row) left_lay.addWidget(gest_grp)
# Subject filter subj_grp = QGroupBox("Subject Filter") subj_grp.setStyleSheet(_PANEL_STYLE) subj_lay = QVBoxLayout(subj_grp) self._subj_list = QListWidget() self._subj_list.setSelectionMode(QAbstractItemView.SelectionMode.MultiSelection) self._subj_list.setMaximumHeight(90) self._subj_list.itemSelectionChanged.connect(self._update_preview) subj_lay.addWidget(self._subj_list) sb_row = QHBoxLayout() for lbl, fn in [("All", self._subj_list.selectAll), ("None", self._subj_list.clearSelection)]: b = QPushButton(lbl) b.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) b.setFixedHeight(22) b.clicked.connect(fn) sb_row.addWidget(b) subj_lay.addLayout(sb_row) left_lay.addWidget(subj_grp)
# Split strategy split_grp = QGroupBox("Train / Val / Test Split") split_grp.setStyleSheet(_PANEL_STYLE) split_lay = QVBoxLayout(split_grp) self._btn_group = QButtonGroup(self)
self._radio_cross = QRadioButton("Cross-trial (tag-based)") self._radio_cross.setChecked(True) self._btn_group.addButton(self._radio_cross) split_lay.addWidget(self._radio_cross)
cross_form = QFormLayout() cross_form.setSpacing(4) self._train_tags_edit = QLineEdit("trial1") self._train_tags_edit.setToolTip("Comma-separated trial labels for training") cross_form.addRow("Train tags:", self._train_tags_edit) self._val_tags_edit = QLineEdit("") self._val_tags_edit.setPlaceholderText("optional — e.g. trial2") self._val_tags_edit.setToolTip("Comma-separated trial labels for validation (optional)") cross_form.addRow("Val tags:", self._val_tags_edit) self._test_tags_edit = QLineEdit("trial2rh") cross_form.addRow("Test tags:", self._test_tags_edit) split_lay.addLayout(cross_form)
self._radio_combined = QRadioButton("Combined (random stratified split)") self._btn_group.addButton(self._radio_combined) split_lay.addWidget(self._radio_combined)
frac_form = QFormLayout() frac_form.setSpacing(4) self._val_frac_spin = QDoubleSpinBox() self._val_frac_spin.setRange(0.0, 0.4) self._val_frac_spin.setSingleStep(0.05) self._val_frac_spin.setValue(0.1) self._val_frac_spin.setSuffix(" (val)") self._val_frac_spin.setToolTip("Fraction held out as validation set") frac_form.addRow("Val frac:", self._val_frac_spin) self._test_frac_spin = QDoubleSpinBox() self._test_frac_spin.setRange(0.05, 0.5) self._test_frac_spin.setSingleStep(0.05) self._test_frac_spin.setValue(0.2) self._test_frac_spin.setSuffix(" (test)") frac_form.addRow("Test frac:", self._test_frac_spin) split_lay.addLayout(frac_form)
self._radio_cross.toggled.connect(self._update_split_ui) self._radio_combined.toggled.connect(self._update_split_ui) self._radio_cross.toggled.connect(self._update_preview) self._radio_combined.toggled.connect(self._update_preview) left_lay.addWidget(split_grp)
# Cross-validation cv_grp = QGroupBox("Cross-Validation") cv_grp.setStyleSheet(_PANEL_STYLE) cv_lay = QVBoxLayout(cv_grp) self._cv_btn_group = QButtonGroup(self)
self._cv_none = QRadioButton("None (single split)") self._cv_none.setChecked(True) self._cv_btn_group.addButton(self._cv_none) cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_none)
self._cv_kfold = QRadioButton("K-Fold stratified") self._cv_btn_group.addButton(self._cv_kfold) kf_row = QHBoxLayout() kf_row.addWidget(self._cv_kfold) self._cv_k_spin = QSpinBox() self._cv_k_spin.setRange(2, 10) self._cv_k_spin.setValue(5) self._cv_k_spin.setMaximumWidth(55) kf_row.addWidget(QLabel("K:")) kf_row.addWidget(self._cv_k_spin) kf_row.addStretch() cv_lay.addLayout(kf_row)
self._cv_loso = QRadioButton("Leave-One-Subject-Out") self._cv_btn_group.addButton(self._cv_loso) cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_loso) left_lay.addWidget(cv_grp)
# Preprocessing pre_grp = QGroupBox("Preprocessing") pre_lay = QVBoxLayout(pre_grp) pre_form = QFormLayout() pre_form.setSpacing(5)
self._norm_combo = QComboBox() self._norm_combo.addItem("Z-score per channel", "z_channel") self._norm_combo.addItem("Z-score global", "z_global") self._norm_combo.addItem("None", "none") pre_form.addRow("Normalise:", self._norm_combo)
self._ch_reduce_combo = QComboBox() self._ch_reduce_combo.addItem("None", "none") self._ch_reduce_combo.addItem("Top-N by variance", "variance_top_n") self._ch_reduce_combo.addItem("PCA (flatten)", "pca") self._ch_reduce_combo.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._update_ch_reduce_ui) pre_form.addRow("Channel reduce:", self._ch_reduce_combo)
self._ch_n_spin = QSpinBox() self._ch_n_spin.setRange(1, 512) self._ch_n_spin.setValue(32) self._ch_n_spin.setEnabled(False) pre_form.addRow("# channels:", self._ch_n_spin)
self._augment_cb = QCheckBox("Augment training data") pre_form.addRow(self._augment_cb)
self._noise_spin = QDoubleSpinBox() self._noise_spin.setRange(0.0, 0.5) self._noise_spin.setSingleStep(0.005) self._noise_spin.setValue(0.005) self._noise_spin.setEnabled(False) self._augment_cb.toggled.connect( lambda c: (self._noise_spin.setEnabled(c), self._shift_spin.setEnabled(c))) pre_form.addRow("Noise σ:", self._noise_spin)
self._shift_spin = QSpinBox() self._shift_spin.setRange(0, 50) self._shift_spin.setValue(5) self._shift_spin.setSuffix(" samples") self._shift_spin.setEnabled(False) pre_form.addRow("Time shift ±:", self._shift_spin) left_lay.addWidget(pre_grp)
# Model model_grp = QGroupBox("Model") model_lay = QFormLayout(model_grp) model_lay.setSpacing(5)
self._model_combo = QComboBox() for display, _ in _MODEL_TYPES: self._model_combo.addItem(display) model_lay.addRow("Model type:", self._model_combo)
self._feat_combo = QComboBox() self._feat_combo.addItem("Default features (MAV, RMS, WL, ZC, SSC, …)") self._feat_combo.addItem("Raw EMG windows") model_lay.addRow("Features:", self._feat_combo)
self._model_name_edit = QLineEdit() self._model_name_edit.setPlaceholderText("auto-generated if empty") model_lay.addRow("Model name:", self._model_name_edit) left_lay.addWidget(model_grp)
# Preview + train self._preview_lbl = QLabel("—") self._preview_lbl.setStyleSheet( f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;" f"background:{_C['panel']};border:1px solid {_C['border']};" "border-radius:4px;padding:5px;") self._preview_lbl.setWordWrap(True) left_lay.addWidget(self._preview_lbl)
btn_row = QHBoxLayout() self._train_btn = QPushButton("Train Model") self._train_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_PRIMARY) self._train_btn.setFixedHeight(34) self._train_btn.setEnabled(False) self._train_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_train) btn_row.addWidget(self._train_btn)
self._stop_btn = QPushButton("■ Stop") self._stop_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) self._stop_btn.setFixedHeight(38) self._stop_btn.setEnabled(False) self._stop_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_stop_training) btn_row.addWidget(self._stop_btn)
close_btn = QPushButton("Close") close_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) close_btn.setFixedHeight(38) close_btn.clicked.connect(self.reject) btn_row.addWidget(close_btn) left_lay.addLayout(btn_row)
self._progress = QProgressBar() self._progress.setRange(0, 100) self._progress.setValue(0) left_lay.addWidget(self._progress)
self._status_lbl = QLabel("") self._status_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") self._status_lbl.setWordWrap(True) left_lay.addWidget(self._status_lbl)
left_lay.addStretch()
# ── Right panel: results tabs ───────────────────────────────────────── right_widget = QWidget() right_lay = QVBoxLayout(right_widget) right_lay.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0) root.addWidget(right_widget, stretch=1)
self._results_tabs = QTabWidget() right_lay.addWidget(self._results_tabs)
# Tab 0: Summary summary_tab = QWidget() sum_lay = QVBoxLayout(summary_tab)
# Score banner self._banner = QLabel("Train a model to see results") self._banner.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter) self._banner.setStyleSheet( f"font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:{_C['accent2']};" f"background:{_C['panel']};border-radius:8px;padding:14px;") sum_lay.addWidget(self._banner)
# Metrics row metrics_row = QHBoxLayout() self._metric_cards: Dict[str, QLabel] = {} for key, label, color in [ ("train_acc", "Train Acc", _C["success"]), ("val_acc", "Val Acc", _C["warning"]), ("test_acc", "Test Acc", _C["accent2"]), ("cv_mean", "CV Mean", _C["accent"]), ]: card = QFrame() card.setStyleSheet( f"background:{_C['panel']};border:1px solid {_C['border']};" "border-radius:8px;padding:6px;") card_lay = QVBoxLayout(card) title_lbl = QLabel(label) title_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;font-weight:600;") title_lbl.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter) card_lay.addWidget(title_lbl) val_lbl = QLabel("—") val_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{color};font-size:20px;font-weight:700;") val_lbl.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter) card_lay.addWidget(val_lbl) metrics_row.addWidget(card) self._metric_cards[key] = val_lbl sum_lay.addLayout(metrics_row)
# Per-class table self._summary_lbl = QLabel("") self._summary_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"font-size:11px;color:{_C['muted']};padding:2px 4px;") sum_lay.addWidget(self._summary_lbl)
self._results_table = QTableWidget() self._results_table.setColumnCount(5) self._results_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels( ["Gesture", "Accuracy", "95% CI", "Windows", "Bar"]) self._results_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._results_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) self._results_table.setAlternatingRowColors(True) self._results_table.setSelectionBehavior(QAbstractItemView.SelectionBehavior.SelectRows) sum_lay.addWidget(self._results_table)
# Per-subject table self._subj_result_lbl = QLabel("Per-subject accuracy:") self._subj_result_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") sum_lay.addWidget(self._subj_result_lbl) self._subj_table = QTableWidget() self._subj_table.setColumnCount(2) self._subj_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(["Subject", "Test Accuracy"]) self._subj_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._subj_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) self._subj_table.setMaximumHeight(120) sum_lay.addWidget(self._subj_table)
save_export_row = QHBoxLayout() self._save_btn = QPushButton("Save Model") self._save_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_PRIMARY) self._save_btn.setFixedHeight(34) self._save_btn.setEnabled(False) self._save_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_save_model) save_export_row.addWidget(self._save_btn)
self._export_btn = QPushButton(" Export CSV") self._export_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) self._export_btn.setFixedHeight(32) self._export_btn.setEnabled(False) self._export_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_export_csv) save_export_row.addWidget(self._export_btn) sum_lay.addLayout(save_export_row)
self._results_tabs.addTab(summary_tab, "Summary")
# Tab 1: Confusion matrix cm_tab = QWidget() cm_lay = QVBoxLayout(cm_tab) self._cm_canvas = _ConfusionMatrixCanvas() cm_lay.addWidget(self._cm_canvas) self._results_tabs.addTab(cm_tab, "Confusion Matrix")
# Tab 2: Live training curves live_tab = QWidget() live_lay = QVBoxLayout(live_tab) live_info = QLabel("Live loss and accuracy curves update during training (deep models only).") live_info.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['muted']};font-size:10px;") live_lay.addWidget(live_info) self._live_canvas = _LiveCurveCanvas() live_lay.addWidget(self._live_canvas) self._results_tabs.addTab(live_tab, "Training Curves")
# Tab 3: Learning curve lc_tab = QWidget() lc_lay = QVBoxLayout(lc_tab) lc_hdr = QHBoxLayout() lc_hdr.addWidget(QLabel("Compute learning curve (accuracy vs. #training files):")) self._lc_btn = QPushButton("Run") self._lc_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) self._lc_btn.setFixedHeight(34) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(False) self._lc_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_learning_curve) lc_hdr.addWidget(self._lc_btn) lc_hdr.addStretch() lc_lay.addLayout(lc_hdr) self._lc_canvas = _LearningCurveCanvas() lc_lay.addWidget(self._lc_canvas) self._results_tabs.addTab(lc_tab, "Learning Curve")
# Tab 4: CV results cv_tab = QWidget() cv_lay = QVBoxLayout(cv_tab) self._cv_table = QTableWidget() self._cv_table.setColumnCount(2) self._cv_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(["Fold / Subject", "Accuracy"]) self._cv_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._cv_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_table) self._cv_summary_lbl = QLabel("") self._cv_summary_lbl.setStyleSheet(f"color:{_C['accent2']};font-weight:600;") cv_lay.addWidget(self._cv_summary_lbl) self._results_tabs.addTab(cv_tab, "CV Folds")
# Tab 5: Model comparison cmp_tab = QWidget() cmp_lay = QVBoxLayout(cmp_tab) cmp_hdr = QHBoxLayout() cmp_hdr.addWidget(QLabel("All trained models this session (sorted by test accuracy):")) clear_cmp_btn = QPushButton("Clear") clear_cmp_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_SECONDARY) clear_cmp_btn.setFixedHeight(24) clear_cmp_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_clear_comparison) cmp_hdr.addWidget(clear_cmp_btn) cmp_hdr.addStretch() cmp_lay.addLayout(cmp_hdr) self._cmp_table = QTableWidget() self._cmp_table.setColumnCount(7) self._cmp_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels( ["Name", "Type", "Train Acc", "Val Acc", "Test Acc", "CV Mean", "Time"]) self._cmp_table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Stretch) self._cmp_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.EditTrigger.NoEditTriggers) self._cmp_table.setAlternatingRowColors(True) cmp_lay.addWidget(self._cmp_table) save_best_btn = QPushButton("Save Selected Model") save_best_btn.setStyleSheet(_BTN_PRIMARY) save_best_btn.setFixedHeight(30) save_best_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_save_selected_from_comparison) cmp_lay.addWidget(save_best_btn) self._results_tabs.addTab(cmp_tab, "Compare Models")
# Tab 6: Log log_tab = QWidget() log_lay = QVBoxLayout(log_tab) self._log_text = QTextEdit() self._log_text.setReadOnly(True) self._log_text.setStyleSheet( f"QTextEdit{{font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;" f"background:{_C['bg']};color:{_C['text']};" f"border:1px solid {_C['border']};border-radius:3px;padding:4px;}}") log_lay.addWidget(self._log_text) self._results_tabs.addTab(log_tab, "Log")
# Initialise split UI self._update_split_ui()
# ─── auto-detect & helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _try_auto_detect(self): try: from playagain_pipeline.gui.widgets.quattrocento_loader import discover_quattrocento_root p = discover_quattrocento_root(self._data_dir) if p: self._set_root(p) except Exception: pass
def _update_split_ui(self): cross = self._radio_cross.isChecked() self._train_tags_edit.setEnabled(cross) self._val_tags_edit.setEnabled(cross) self._test_tags_edit.setEnabled(cross) self._val_frac_spin.setEnabled(not cross) self._test_frac_spin.setEnabled(not cross)
def _update_ch_reduce_ui(self): enabled = self._ch_reduce_combo.currentData() != "none" self._ch_n_spin.setEnabled(enabled)
def _primary_config(self) -> Tuple[int, int]: return self._ws_spin.value(), self._nc_spin.value()
def _primary_recs(self): if self._loader is None: return [] ws, nc = self._primary_config() return [r for r in self._loader.recordings if r.window_size == ws and r.n_channels == nc]
def _selected_gestures(self) -> List[str]: return [item.data(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole) for item in self._gest_list.selectedItems()]
def _selected_subjects(self) -> List[str]: sel = [item.data(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole) for item in self._subj_list.selectedItems()] return sel if sel else None # None = all subjects
# ─── slots ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@Slot() def _on_browse(self): p = QFileDialog.getExistingDirectory( self, "Select Quattrocento Data Root", str(self._data_dir)) if p: self._set_root(Path(p))
def _set_root(self, path: Path): self._root_edit.setText(str(path)) self._scan_btn.setEnabled(True) self._scan_info.setText(f"Click 'Scan' to discover recordings in:\n{path}")
@Slot() def _on_scan(self): from playagain_pipeline.gui.widgets.quattrocento_loader import QuattrocentoSubjectLoader root = Path(self._root_edit.text()) ws, nc = self._primary_config() self._scan_btn.setEnabled(False) self._scan_info.setText("Scanning…") try: loader = QuattrocentoSubjectLoader(root) all_recs = loader.scan(verbose=False) primary = [r for r in all_recs if r.window_size == ws and r.n_channels == nc] skipped = len(all_recs) - len(primary) self._loader = loader
gestures = sorted( {r.gesture for r in primary}, key=lambda g: _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER.index(g) if g in _DEFAULT_LABEL_ORDER else 999) self._gest_list.clear() for g in gestures: n = sum(1 for r in primary if r.gesture == g) item = QListWidgetItem(f"{g} ({n} files)") item.setData(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole, g) self._gest_list.addItem(item) self._gest_list.selectAll()
subjects = sorted({r.subject_id for r in primary}) self._subj_list.clear() for s in subjects: item = QListWidgetItem(s) item.setData(Qt.ItemDataRole.UserRole, s) self._subj_list.addItem(item) self._subj_list.selectAll()
trial_labels = sorted({r.trial_label for r in primary}) info = ( f"Found {len(primary)} primary files ({ws}ws × {nc}ch)\n" f"Subjects : {', '.join(subjects)}\n" f"Trial labels : {', '.join(trial_labels)}\n" ) if skipped: info += f"(skipped {skipped} files with different config)" self._scan_info.setText(info) self._train_btn.setEnabled(True) self._lc_btn.setEnabled(True) self._update_preview() self._log(f"Scan complete: {len(primary)} files, " f"{len(gestures)} gestures, labels: {trial_labels}") except Exception as e: self._scan_info.setText(f"Scan error: {e}") self._log(f"Scan error: {e}") finally: self._scan_btn.setEnabled(True)
def _update_preview(self): if self._loader is None: return gestures = self._selected_gestures() subjects = self._selected_subjects() recs = [r for r in self._primary_recs() if r.gesture in gestures] if subjects: recs = [r for r in recs if r.subject_id in subjects] if not recs: self._preview_lbl.setText("No data matched current filters.") return
if self._radio_cross.isChecked(): tr_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._train_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] va_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._val_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] te_tags = [t.strip() for t in self._test_tags_edit.text().split(",") if t.strip()] n_tr = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs if r.trial_label in tr_tags) n_va = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs if r.trial_label in va_tags) n_te = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs if r.trial_label in te_tags) txt = (f"Train: {n_tr:,} | Val: {n_va:,} | Test: {n_te:,}\n" f"{len(gestures)} classes, {len({r.subject_id for r in recs})} subjects") else: n_total = sum(r.n_windows for r in recs) vf = self._val_frac_spin.value() tf = self._test_frac_spin.value() n_te = int(n_total * tf) n_va = int(n_total * vf) n_tr = n_total - n_va - n_te txt = (f"Train: ~{n_tr:,} | Val: ~{n_va:,} | Test: ~{n_te:,}\n" f"(random stratified split)\n" f"{len(gestures)} classes, {len({r.subject_id for r in recs})} subjects") self._preview_lbl.setText(txt)
@Slot() def _on_train(self): if self._loader is None: return gestures = self._selected_gestures() if not gestures: QMessageBox.warning(self, "No gestures", "Select at least one gesture.") return subjects = self._selected_subjects() recs = [r for r in self._primary_recs() if r.gesture in gestures] if subjects: recs = [r for r in recs if r.subject_id in subjects]
# Build splits train_recs, val_recs, test_recs = self._build_splits(recs, gestures) if not train_recs: QMessageBox.warning(self, "No training data", "No files matched the training tags/split. " "Check your split settings.") return
self._log("=" * 56) self._log(f"Split: {'Cross-trial' if self._radio_cross.isChecked() else 'Combined'}") self._log(f"Gestures : {', '.join(gestures)}") if subjects: self._log(f"Subjects : {', '.join(subjects)}") self._log(f"Train files: {len(train_recs)} | " f"Val: {len(val_recs)} | Test: {len(test_recs)}")
# CV mode cv_map = {self._cv_none: "none", self._cv_kfold: "kfold", self._cv_loso: "loso"} cv_mode = next(k for btn, k in cv_map.items() if btn.isChecked())
# Normalisation norm_mode = self._norm_combo.currentData()
# Channel reduce ch_reduce = self._ch_reduce_combo.currentData()
# Augmentation augment = self._augment_cb.isChecked()
# Model mi = self._model_combo.currentIndex() model_type = _MODEL_TYPES[mi][1] ts_str = datetime.now().strftime("%H%M%S") model_name = (self._model_name_edit.text().strip() or f"q4_{model_type}_{ts_str}")
